sense.definition: having the color of the ocean or clear sky at daytime

examples.x: My mother has blue eyes and black hair.
The little boy's favorite toy was a blue car.
The ocean's blue color amazed us.

sense.definition: of a specific shade of blue used by the Chrysler Corporation in its logo

examples.x: The bedroom walls were painted in a calming Chrysler blue color, creating a peaceful atmosphere.
The lake reflected the Chrysler blue color of the sky, creating a picturesque scene.
His eyes sparkled like the Chrysler blue ocean as he shared his exciting adventure.
The car gleamed in the sunlight, its Chrysler blue exterior drawing attention on the street.
The classroom walls were painted with a light Chrysler blue tint, creating a conducive environment for learning.

sense.definition: of a specific shade of blue associated with Duke University

examples.x: The team proudly wore in the iconic Duke blue jerseys, representing their university on the court.
The Duke blue walls of the library provided a serene environment for focused studying.
The Duke blue flowers in the garden added a pop of color to the landscape.
The Duke blue banners hung proudly along the main entrance of the campus.
The Duke blue sky overhead created a beautiful backdrop for the campus tour.

sense.definition: having a vibrant blue pigment used in ancient Egyptian art and artifacts, created from a mixture of silica, copper, calcium, and other minerals
having a dark blue color often associated with the uniforms of the United States Navy and other military organizations

examples.x: The courthouse hallways were painted in a calming Federal blue shade.

sense.definition: having a very dark blue color like the deep sea
of a deep, rich shade of blue often associated with the traditional tiles and art of Iran
of a deep, rich blue color inspired by the historic Byzantine Empire, often associated with luxury and opulence

examples.x: The library's rare book collection included ancient texts with Byzantine blue illuminated initials.
The decorative tiles in the courtyard were painted in intricate Byzantine blue patterns.

sense.definition: having a very pale shade of blue
having a dark blue color with a hint of green, originally derived from the dye Prussian blue
having a deep greenish-blue color
having a deep and dark blue color with a slightly muted or dusty tone, reminiscent of the dark blue color
of a vivid and deep shade of blue, often associated with intensity and richness

examples.x: The painter used bold ultramarine strokes of to bring life to the ocean in the artwork.
The eyes of the protagonist in the painting were captivating, painted in a striking ultramarine shade.
The elegant evening gown shimmered in the dim light, adorned with intricate ultramarine embroidery.
The vintage car's exterior was restored to its original glory, featuring a glossy coat of ultramarine paint.

sense.definition: having a color that looks like a mix of purple and blue

examples.x: The flower petals had a beautiful violet-blue gradient, creating a captivating display.
The bridesmaids wore dresses in a lovely violet-blue shade, complementing the wedding theme.
The watercolor painting depicted a mountain range against a backdrop of violet-blue skies.
The bedroom was decorated with curtains in a soothing violet-blue color, promoting relaxation.
The bird's feathers had a striking violet-blue iridescence, adding to its beauty.

sense.definition: characterized by a vivid and intense blue color that was discovered in 2009 and is known for its unique and vibrant hue

examples.x: The artist painted a stunning abstract piece using vibrant YInMn blue shade.
The logo stood out with its bold use of YInMn blue color, symbolizing innovation.
The car's sleek design featured a YInMn blue metallic sheen.

sense.definition: of a deep blue pigment that has a rich and saturated color, often described as a dark and intense shade of blue with a slight hint of violet or green undertones

examples.x: The sky turned into a stunning zaffre canvas of as the sun set over the horizon.

sense.definition: having a vibrant, dazzling shade of blue that is characterized by its bold and eye-catching appearance

examples.x: Her eyes sparkled with a touch of b'dazzled blue eyeshadow, adding a pop of color.
The sports team introduced a new uniform featuring a bold b'dazzled blue accent.
The car's interior boasted a stylish dashboard with a hint of b'dazzled blue trim.
The smartphone screen lit up with a vibrant b'dazzled blue wallpaper.
The tech gadget came in a sleek casing with elements of b'dazzled blue shade, giving it a modern look.

sense.definition: having a soft, delicate shade of blue that resembles the color of the flower of the same name, typically described as a pale, pastel blue hue

examples.x: The nursery was painted in a calming blue bell shade to create a serene environment.
The bridesmaids wore dresses in a beautiful blue bell color, complementing the wedding theme.
The artist used blue bell paint to capture the tranquility of the countryside in the landscape.
The vintage teacup had a delicate hand-painted design featuring blue bell flowers.
The baby blanket was knitted with soft yarn in a soothing blue bell color.

sense.definition: of a deep, sturdy blue color resembling the color of denim fabric used in jeans

examples.x: The kitchen cabinets were repainted in a trendy denim shade, updating the overall look.
The bedroom walls were painted with a soothing denim tint, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere.
The tablecloth at the family dinner was a vibrant denim color.
The artist mixed various paints to achieve the perfect denim color for the mural.
Her favorite sweater was a cozy knit in a lovely denim shade.

sense.definition: having a medium blue-green color, lighter than navy
having a light to medium shade of blue, often described as a pale, sky-blue color reminiscent of a clear blue sky on a sunny day

examples.x: Her dress flowed gracefully in a fabric dyed in a rich blue yonder shade.
The bedroom walls were painted in a calming blue yonder hue.
The company logo featured a modern and refreshing blue yonder color.
The living room was adorned with accents in a soft blue yonder tone.
The interior design incorporated furniture in a subtle blue yonder shade.

sense.definition: of a pale, icy blue color that evokes the image of frozen icebergs or crisp winter landscapes

examples.x: The swimmer's goggles were a sleek and reflective iceberg blue color.
The abstract painting used bold iceberg blue strokes to convey a sense of tranquility.
The bedroom was adorned with bedsheets in a soothing iceberg blue shade, promoting restful sleep.
The travel brochure showcased images of pristine beaches against an iceberg blue ocean backdrop.
The winter jacket kept her warm with its insulated material in a fashionable iceberg blue color.

sense.definition: having a bright, vibrant shade of blue that resembles the luminous glow of neon lights

examples.x: The nightclub was bathed in the pulsating glow of neon blue lights, creating a lively atmosphere.
The artist used neon blue paint to add a striking highlight to the graffiti mural.
The tech company's logo featured a modern design with bold, neon blue lettering.
The cityscape at night was illuminated by the neon blue signs of various shops and cafes.
The digital clock on the office wall displayed the time in bright neon blue digits.

sense.definition: having a soft, pale shade of blue that falls between blue and lavender

examples.x: The bridesmaids wore periwinkle blue dresses, adding a touch of elegance to the wedding.
The artist used periwinkle blue pastels to capture the delicate petals of the flowers in the landscape.
The vintage teacup had a charming design with periwinkle blue accents.
The baby's nursery was decorated with periwinkle blue curtains.
The invitation cards featured periwinkle blue patterns.

sense.definition: having a vivid, deep blue color reminiscent of the iconic bluebonnet flowers found in Texas
having a rich and vibrant shade of blue that is often associated with the concept of freedom, liberty, and independence
having a color that is appearing as a deep and muted shade with a mix of both blue and purple undertones

examples.x: The bedroom walls were painted in an original blurple color, creating a vibrant and personalized atmosphere.
The fashion designer's collection featured dresses in various shades, with one standout piece in an original blurple shade.
The logo for the startup had a modern and dynamic design, utilizing the eye-catching tones of original blurple color.
The tech company's website featured a unique color scheme inspired by original blurple shade, setting it apart.
The flower bouquet incorporated rare blooms in original blurple hues.

sense.definition: having a muted, cool-toned shade of blue that resembles the color of weathered slate rock

examples.x: The bedroom was painted in a tranquil slate blue color, promoting a restful atmosphere.
The business logo incorporated a sleek design with typography in slate blue shades.
She bought slate blue hair dye for herself to try a fun new hair color.
The throw pillows on the couch added a pop of color in various slate blue patterns.
The office decor featured accent walls in a sophisticated slate blue hue, creating a professional ambiance.

sense.definition: having a vivid, intense shade of blue with a rich, saturated hue, often associated with the vibrant blue color used by French painter Jacques Majorelle

examples.x: The outdoor furniture on the terrace was adorned with cushions in a luxurious Majorelle blue fabric.
The accent wall in the living room was painted in a bold Majorelle blue shade, creating a focal point.
The beach umbrella had a striking Majorelle blue canopy, standing out against the sandy shoreline.
The fashion designer incorporated Majorelle blue tone into the summer collection for a fresh and vibrant look.
The statement necklace featured beads and gems in a captivating Majorelle blue cast, adding drama to the ensemble.

sense.definition: having a very dark shade of blue
having a rich and saturated shade of blue that falls between peacock blue and periwinkle on the color spectrum

examples.x: The ballroom was adorned with drapes in a luxurious blue Savoy color.
The blue Savoy velvet cushions added a touch of opulence to the vintage furniture.
The fashion designer chose a stunning blue Savoy fabric for the evening gown.
The executive office was furnished with sleek, modern chairs in a muted blue Savoy tone.
The classic car gleamed with a polished exterior in a deep blue Savoy shade

sense.definition: of a color that combines the soft, muted tones of mauve with the cool, serene hues of blue, resulting in a delicate and calming color

examples.x: The bedroom was adorned with curtains in a soothing mauve-blue shade, creating a tranquil atmosphere.
The logo for the spa featured a lotus flower in gentle mauve-blue tones, reflecting serenity and relaxation.
The artist's palette included a harmonious blend of mauve and blue, creating a unique mauve-blue shade.
The digital illustration showcased a dreamy landscape painted in mauve-blue hues, conveying a sense of fantasy.
The vintage teacup had a delicate hand-painted design with intricate mauve-blue patterns.

sense.definition: having a color that combines the soft, muted tones of lilac with the cool, calming hues of blue

examples.x: The nursery was painted in a serene lilac-blue color, creating a peaceful environment for the baby.
The bridesmaids' dresses were chosen in a lovely lilac-blue shade, adding a touch of elegance to the wedding.
The floral arrangement on the dining table included lilac-blue blossoms, adding a touch of freshness.
The bedroom decor incorporated bedding and drapes in a complementary lilac-blue palette, promoting tranquility.
The evening sky transformed into a canvas of lilac-blue cast as the sun set behind the hills.

sense.definition: having a lively and refreshing shade of blue, like the vibrant blue of the Mediterranean around Capri

examples.x: The towels had a trendy capri blue stripe.
The pool sparkled with lively capri blue water.
Her dress featured a playful touch of capri blue shade.
The bedroom had pillows in capri blue color.
The drink gleamed in capri blue glass.
